arts.sum: Aston Villa sent a scout to the Estádio do Dragão for FC Porto’s clash against FC Midtjylland in the Europa League on Thursday. That’s according to Friday’s edition of A Bola, and they say an Aston Villa official was in attendance to closely follow the European tie.
